vBRIEFInfo.description: Story 2 of #883 v1: cache infrastructure (scripts/cache.py, 5 commands) + scanner v2 (3 categories baseline-on) for the github-issue source. Wave 2; depends on Story 1's scm:issue:view interface; provides the cache:get interface that Story 3 rebinds onto.

plan.title: feat(cache,quarantine): unified cache + scanner v2 baseline (#883 Story 2)

narratives.Problem: Triage v1 (#845) shipped a triage-specific cache that drifted from its stated contract (#915 P0). #883 v1 replaces it with a content-agnostic cache and quarantine layer that future consumers (wiki-llm #610, URL/email/file ingestion) can reuse without reimplementing. The v1 trim limits scope to one source type (github-issue) and three scanner categories so the foundation ships fast and clean.
narratives.Overview: Ship `scripts/cache.py` (5 cache commands), `scripts/cache_scanner.py` (3 baseline categories), `tasks/cache.yml` (Taskfile fragment), and `vbrief/schemas/cache-meta.schema.json` (frozen meta.json contract validated on read AND write). Storage layout: `.deft-cache/<source>/<key>/{raw.json, content.md, meta.json}` plus `.deft-cache/quarantine-audit.jsonl` global audit log. Hard-coded TTL: github-issue=7d. Scanner severity is per-category (NOT uniform hard-fail per epic design_doc_departures): injection-heading=fence-and-pass, credentials=hard-fail, invisible-unicode=strip-and-pass.
narratives.Constraint: v1 = github-issue source only; do NOT implement github-pr, github-review, url, email, or file source types (epic deferred_to_v2). cache:check, cache:doctor full, cache:stats dashboard, cache:refresh: deferred. ETag refresh: deferred (gh CLI doesn't expose ETag at the JSON layer). Mutation-triggered auto-invalidation: deferred (v1 = explicit cache:invalidate by consumers). Scanner extensions YAML: deferred (v1 = code-baseline only / C1a). meta.json schema (M4) MUST validate on read AND write (fail-closed contract). Rate-limit handling (M1) and idempotency + partial-failure (M2) MUST ship in v1. PowerShell 5.1 non-ASCII rule (#798) governs all file edits.
narratives.Outcome: task cache:put | get | invalidate | fetch-all | prune functional for github-issue source. cache:put runs scanner before content.md write; hard-fail (credentials) writes only raw.json + meta.json (no content.md), exits 2; soft-flag (injection-heading) wraps suspicious sections in `quarantined` fences; invisible-unicode strips chars and records in flags. cache:get returns content.md path + meta.json contents; flags stale=true when current time > expires_at; never auto-refreshes. cache:fetch-all batches 10 issues with 500ms delay (overrideable), retries on 429 with Retry-After parsing, skips fresh entries (TTL idempotency), exits with structured {succeeded, failed, skipped} count on partial failure. cache:invalidate deletes the entry directory + appends invalidation audit. cache:prune drops entries older than 30d (default). meta.json schema validates the full field set: source, key, fetched_at, ttl_seconds, expires_at, scan_result {passed, scanned_at, scanner_version, flags[]}, size_bytes, stale; etag reserved.
narratives.Test: ~80-100 unit tests across cache primitives + scanner categories. Cache: cache:put atomic write + scanner integration + hard-fail/soft-flag/strip-and-pass paths; cache:get + stale flag; cache:invalidate; cache:fetch-all rate-limit (mocked subprocess delays + 429 retry); cache:fetch-all idempotency (skip-fresh + partial-failure exit shape); cache:prune. Scanner: ~10-15 positive + ~10-15 negative cases per category (injection-heading reuses #845's 14 tokens; credentials curated regex list; invisible-unicode codepoint set); cross-pattern interaction; empty/long/malformed body edge cases. ~3 integration tests covering fetch-all rate-limit, partial-failure recovery, scan-failure semantics. Schema validation: positive (full valid meta.json) + negative (missing required field, wrong type, unknown source).
narratives.Action: Create scripts/cache.py + scripts/cache_scanner.py + tasks/cache.yml + vbrief/schemas/cache-meta.schema.json. Wire tasks/cache.yml into parent Taskfile.yml includes. Add unit tests + integration tests. Ship single PR. Run review-cycle. Merge. Story 3 dispatch unblocks.

items.title: scripts/cache.py NEW: 5 commands (cache:put, cache:get, cache:invalidate, cache:fetch-all, cache:prune); atomic write semantics; storage layout .deft-cache/<source>/<key>/{raw.json,content.md,meta.json}

vbrief/schemas/cache-meta.schema.json NEW: JSON Schema 2020-12 validating full meta.json field set (source, key, fetched_at, ttl_seconds, expires_at, scan_result {passed, scanned_at, scanner_version, flags[]}, size_bytes, stale; etag optional/reserved); validated on read AND write (M4)

cache:put runs scanner before content.md write; on credentials hard-fail writes only raw.json + meta.json (no content.md), exits 2; on injection-heading wraps in fences and writes content.md; on invisible-unicode strips chars and writes content.md; one append to quarantine-audit.jsonl per cache:put regardless of outcome
cache:get returns content.md path + meta.json contents; computes stale=true when current time > expires_at; never auto-refreshes; --allow-stale and --no-stale flags supported

cache:fetch-all rate-limit handling (M1): --batch-size N (default 10), --delay-ms N (default 500), 429 response retry with Retry-After header parsing; calls task scm:issue:view (Story 1 interface) per issue

cache:fetch-all idempotency + partial-failure (M2): skip already-cached entries fresh per TTL (7d for github-issue); on partial failure exit non-zero with structured {succeeded, failed, skipped} count; persisted entries survive partial failure

cache:invalidate deletes entry directory + appends invalidation reason to audit log; cache:prune drops entries with expires_at older than 30d (default), --older-than override, --dry-run preview, --source filter

scripts/cache_scanner.py injection-heading category: reuse 14-token list from quarantine_ext.py (STEP, TASK:, IMPORTANT:, etc.); heading-context only; severity = fence-and-pass (wraps in `quarantined` fences); preserves existing #845 semantic

scripts/cache_scanner.py credentials category: curated regex list (gh[pousr]_, sk-, sk-ant-, xox[bp]-, AKIA*, PEM private key headers, Bearer tokens, JWT shape); body-wide; severity = hard-fail (no content.md written); meta.json scan_result.passed=false

scripts/cache_scanner.py invisible-unicode category: codepoint membership test (U+200B-200F, U+202A-202E, U+2060, U+2066-2069, U+FEFF, U+E0000-E007F); severity = strip-and-pass (chars stripped from content.md; flags record what was stripped + where)

Scanner version constant SCANNER_VERSION at module top; each cache:put records scanner_version in meta.json.scan_result.scanner_version + quarantine-audit.jsonl entry; semver bumps documented (patch=patterns, minor=categories, major=semantic rewrites)

tasks/cache.yml NEW: Taskfile fragment exposing 5 cache commands; wired into parent tasks/Taskfile.yml includes block under canonical `cache:` namespace; no doubled prefix; no sources:/generates: per conventions/task-caching.md

tests/test_cache.py + tests/test_cache_scanner.py: ~80-100 unit tests covering all primitives, all 3 scanner categories (positive + negative + edge cases), schema validation positive/negative, atomic write, stale flag, 429 retry, partial failure exit shape

tests/integration/test_cache_quarantine.py: ~3 integration tests covering fetch-all rate-limit (fake-gh shim with simulated 429), partial-failure recovery (mid-batch error), cache:put scan-failure semantics (real credentials regex match)
task check passes (validate + lint + test + verify:encoding + verify:branch); coverage threshold maintained

Design: Unified Content Cache and Quarantine Layer (visionik; canonical meta.json field set is here)
Issue #583: name governance pattern + injection-quarantine directive (this story extends the injection-quarantine half to scanner v2)
Issue #835: memory write security scan (sibling consumer of the unified scanner)

Issue #845: pre-ingest triage workflow (predecessor cache surface that this story replaces)
